name: 72"x72" Adelaide Floral Ruffles Cotton Slub Shower Curtain - Threshold™
description:
Give your bath space a stylish update with the Adelaide Floral Ruffles Shower Curtain from Threshold™. The shower curtain comes in a cream hue with floral ruffles on the bottom trim to add eye-catching flair to your bath space. Crafted from cotton slub fabric, this shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation and is machine washable for convenient cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
